data.label: AI Triage + Draft LLM
data.name: llmAgentflow
data.description: Large language models to analyze user-provided inputs and generate responses

inputParams.description: Enable memory for the conversation thread

options.description: Retrieve all messages from the conversation

options.name: windowSize
options.description: Uses a fixed window size to surface the last N messages

options.name: conversationSummaryBuffer
options.description: Summarize conversations once token limit is reached. Default to 2000

inputParams.name: llmMemoryWindowSize
inputParams.description: Uses a fixed window size to surface the last N messages

inputParams.label: Max Token Limit
inputParams.name: llmMemoryMaxTokenLimit
inputParams.description: Summarize conversations once token limit is reached. Default to 2000

inputParams.name: llmUserMessage
inputParams.description: Add an input message as user message at the end of the conversation

inputParams.name: llmStructuredOutput
inputParams.description: Instruct the LLM to give output in a JSON structured schema

inputParams.label: Update Flow State
inputParams.name: llmUpdateState
inputParams.description: Update runtime state during the execution of the workflow

llmMessages.content: You are an enterprise support email reply assistant. Your job is to classify the incoming support email and produce a grounded reply draft. Use only the provided knowledge base results when making factual claims. If the KB does not support a definitive answer, write a polite, professional draft that acknowledges the request, avoids hallucination and asks for the most useful missing details. The reply must be in the same language as the incoming email. Keep the tone concise, professional and customer-safe. Do not send the email. You are only creating a draft.

llmStructuredOutput.enumValues: bug, billing, access, feature_request, general_question, account, integration, other

llmStructuredOutput.description: Operational priority for the support queue
Short internal summary of the issue
Immediate next action for the support team
Short titles or references of KB items used
Whether the reply still requires explicit human review

data.label: Create Ticket Record
data.name: collectionsAgentflow
data.description: Manage Collections data models, records, fields, relations and views from Agent Flow.

inputParams.label: Mode
inputParams.name: mode
inputParams.description: Select the Collections operation to perform.

inputParams.label: Collection ID
inputParams.name: collectionId
inputParams.description: Target collection identifier.

rendererConfig.manualHelperText: Raw collection ID or variable girebilirsin.
rendererConfig.selectInfoText: Data store icinden collection sec. Collection ID otomatik doldurulur.
rendererConfig.summaryInfoText: Data alaninda Field Values bolumunu kullan. Secilen collection icin inputlar orada cikar.

inputParams.label: Data
inputParams.name: data
inputParams.description: Record payload as JSON object. In create record mode, field inputs can generate this automatically.

rendererConfig.title: Field Inputs
rendererConfig.helperText: Field key olarak {exampleFieldName} kullanilir. Buraya girdigin degerlerden `Data` JSON otomatik uretilir.
rendererConfig.emptySelectionText: Once collection sec, burada field bazli inputlar acilir.
rendererConfig.emptyWritableText: Bu collection icin yazilabilir field yok.
